name: Summary report of accommodation usage
description: Number of people in different accommodation usage

dataset.name: Prisons
dataset.query: select prison_id, name prison_name FROM prisons.prisonregister_prison p where p.active = true order by description

dataset.name: Drug recovery / Incentivised substance free living
dataset.query:
WITH used_for_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        location_id,
        -- Athena V3 uses array_join(array_agg(...)) for ordering and concatenation
        array_join(array_sort(array_agg(usage_type)), ', ') as used_for_list
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT 
            location_id, 
            -- Manual INITCAP for multi-word strings (split, capitalize, rejoin)
            array_join(transform(split(lower(replace(used_for, '_', ' ')), ' '), 
                x -> upper(substring(x, 1, 1)) || substring(x, 2)), ' ') as usage_type
        FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_used_for
    )
    GROUP BY 1
),
prisoner_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        ail2.description,
        ail2.internal_location_id,
        COUNT(*) as p_count
    FROM prisons.nomis_agency_internal_locations ail2
    JOIN prisons.nomis_offender_bookings ob 
      ON ob.living_unit_id = ail2.internal_location_id
    WHERE ob.booking_seq = 1 
      AND ob.active_flag = 'Y'
    GROUP BY ail2.description, ail2.internal_location_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) < 5
),
prisoners AS (
    SELECT 
        pc.description AS key,
        -- Use array_join and transform to handle the name formatting
        array_join(array_sort(array_agg(
            (upper(substring(o.first_name, 1, 1)) || lower(substring(o.first_name, 2))) || ' ' || 
            (upper(substring(o.last_name, 1, 1)) || lower(substring(o.last_name, 2))) || 
            ' (' || o.offender_id_display || ')'
        )), ', ') as prisoner_list
    FROM prisoner_counts pc
    JOIN prisons.nomis_offender_bookings ob 
      ON ob.living_unit_id = pc.internal_location_id 
      AND ob.booking_seq = 1 
      AND ob.active_flag = 'Y'
    JOIN prisons.nomis_offenders o 
      ON o.offender_id = ob.offender_id
    GROUP BY pc.description
)
SELECT l.prison_id,
       p.name                AS prison_name,
       l.id                  AS location_id,
       l.path_hierarchy,
       l.location_type,
       l.status,
       pop.prisoner_list,
       uf.used_for_list
FROM   prisons.locationsinsideprison_location l
       JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p
         ON p.prison_id = l.prison_id
LEFT JOIN 
    prisoners pop ON pop.key = CAST(l.prison_id AS VARCHAR) || '-' || l.path_hierarchy
LEFT JOIN 
    used_for_agg uf ON l.id = uf.location_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_used_for uf_sub 
    WHERE uf_sub.location_id = l.id 
    AND used_for in (Select used_for from prompt_) 
)
AND l.status = 'ACTIVE'

report.name: Accommodation summary
report.description:
Displays people in different accommodation usage.
  • CLOSE_SUPERVISION_CENTRE - Close Supervision Centre (CSC)
  • SUB_MISUSE_DRUG_RECOVERY - Drug recovery / Incentivised substance free living (ISFL)
  • FIRST_NIGHT_CENTRE - First night centre / Induction
  • HIGH_SECURITY - High security unit
  • IPP_LONG_TERM_SENTENCES - Long-term sentences / Imprisonment for public protection (IPP)
  • MOTHER_AND_BABY - Mother and baby
  • OPEN_UNIT - Open unit in a closed establishment
  • PATHWAY_TO_PROG - Pathway to progression
  • PERINATAL_UNIT - Perinatal unit
  • PERSONALITY_DISORDER - Personality disorder unit
  • PIPE - Psychologically informed planned environment (PIPE)
  • REMAND - Remand
  • SEPARATION_CENTRE - Separation centre
  • STANDARD_ACCOMMODATION - Standard accommodation
  • THERAPEUTIC_COMMUNITY - Therapeutic community
  • VULNERABLE_PRISONERS - Vulnerable prisoners
  • YOUNG_PERSONS - Young persons
